text:
.A.,M.ED. FICA.,
Prof: of Education (Tetd) - (SOUTH INDIA)
"TRANSIT OF PLANETS ON THE BIRTH CHART'
The book "TRANSIT OF PLANETS ON THE BIRTH
CHART', writtem by R.G. Rao, is another gem in the already
popular series of book, on Nadi based Astra-Palmistry.
The unassuming genuine researcher, teacher, publisher and Devi
Upasak R.G. RAO. is revealing with missionary zeal the most
quarded secrets ofNadi Astrology to the curious and earnest
students and Professionals of the Nadi System.
R.G. RAO's indepth study of the Nadi Literature, his profound
commonsense, homely convincing day - to - day life examples,
plentiful practical illustrations. the super logic (Tarka) in

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASlROLOGY 105
Karakatwa (Signification) based interpretation of the interchange,
retrogressing, Combination and aspects of planets are highly
interesting, fascinating and stimulating eye openers indeed.
JEERRY WONG-SYDNEY- AUSTRALIA
